executive_summary: All data sources failed this week: Monday API returned query errors across all four boards (CRM, Ads, Video, Web + SEO), Fireflies returned a 400 Bad Request error, and no WhatsApp messages were captured. Without access to task status, meeting notes, or client communications, we have zero visibility into client health, project progress, or upcoming deliverables. This is a critical operational blocker that must be resolved immediately to restore reporting capability.
